description: A raspi3b SBC (issue #4): fixed hardware means NO -cpu/-smp/-m; it direct-boots an external -kernel + -dtb (by name in the Image Store) with a -append cmdline, mounts the SD image on if=sd, and exposes a loopback VNC Display the noVNC Viewer bridges. console=tty1 puts the console on the framebuffer so the Viewer shows a graphical boot.
